resolution_rule: Government-practice override per design-question Q1: when DOPA/RTSD/NSO/TAT/BOI tables agree on a non-strict spelling and the international literature also adopts that spelling, the government-practice spelling wins over strict glyph-by-glyph rendering.
supporting_sources: Tourism Authority of Thailand (TAT) Lopburi province directory; Wikipedia 'Lopburi province' canonical title; Department of Provincial Administration (DOPA) English-language tourism content; Lonely Planet and major academic literature on Thai history
notes: Founding worked example for the override-rule section in the methodology PDF. Three of the four MIT-licensed input sources (thailand-geography-data, GeoThai v1, GeoThai v2) carry 'Loburi' as a propagated upstream quirk; kongvut/thai-province-data carries the 'Lopburi' spelling that matches government and international practice.
